nodes.name: 西澳大利亚州
nodes.summary: 西澳大利亚州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联26种鸟类，包括冠鳩、Torresian imperial pigeon、Dusky moorhen等26种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 新南威爾士州
nodes.summary: 新南威爾士州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括尖羽树鸭、叢塚雉、Black-eared cuckoo等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 維多利亞州
nodes.summary: 維多利亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括尖羽树鸭、Black-eared cuckoo、巨地鸠等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 南澳大利亚州
nodes.summary: 南澳大利亚州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括Dusky moorhen、鹗、黄尾黑凤头鹦鹉等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 吉氏啸鹟
nodes.summary: 吉氏啸鹟（Gilbert's whistler，学名 Pachycephala inornata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Gilbert's whistler inhabits semi-arid tall mallee with sparse shrubby understorey or prickly Acacia thickets and Casuarina woodlands, and is also found in thickets of Melaleuca and, occasionally, in taller eucalypt woodlands or forests. A study undertaken in 2017 on the effect of bushfires and prescribed burns on the distribution of 12 threatened bird species predicted that habitat burnt between 30 and 60 years approximately would be favoured by Gilbert's whistlers while habitat burnt more frequently or not burnt for more than 60 years would not readily suit this species. The distribution of Gilbert's whistlers is scattered in the semi-arid parts of southern Western Australia and South Australia, northwest Victoria and central west New South Wales. No large scale movements were recorded for the species which is thought to be resident or sedentary with a high degree of site fidelity.{{Cite book|last=Reid|first=J
